svg.title: Catalyst System Architecture
svg.desc: End-to-end architecture of the Catalyst AI skill assessment agent, from input parsing to learning plan generation.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Tell me more about the JD and resume parsing step in Catalyst')
sendPrompt('Tell me more about resume parsing in Catalyst')
sendPrompt('How does the skill extraction engine work in Catalyst?')
g.text: NLP parse → required skills + candidate skills

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does gap analysis work in Catalyst?')
sendPrompt('How does the conversational assessor probe skill depth in Catalyst?')
sendPrompt('What data does the proficiency store track in Catalyst?')
sendPrompt('How does Catalyst generate the personalised learning plan?')
sendPrompt('What does the final Catalyst output look like?')
